query:
SELECT 
  o.id, o.order_number, o.total,
  oi.id as item_id, oi.product_name, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.total_price, oi.complements
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.order_number = 240
ORDER BY oi.id;
